---
title: "Introduction to Statistical Computing Exercises"
format: html
---

## 4 Plot curve/function

```{r}
f <- function(x) sin(x)
  curve(f,from = -2,to= 2,type="l", main='Sine Function',lwd=2, col='firebrick', xlab = x, ylab = f(x) )
```

## 5 QQ-plot

```{r}
set.seed(1)
 rnorm(1000, mean = 0, sd = 1)
 
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(car)
qqPlot(x, envelope = 0.95, ylim = c(-5, 5))
```
